title: ficus scassellatii subsp. scassellatii
intro: Ficus scassellatii subsp. scassellatii, also known as Chilean laurel, is a plant species in the family Moraceae. It is a medicinal plant with various health benefits due to its rich composition of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Ficus scassellatii subsp. scassellatii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine in South America.
